office_does: County commissioners set county policy, adopt budgets, and oversee departments and public services.
race_blurb: Incumbent Marc Straub faces independent challenger Michael Lesky, whose approved dossier contains filing-level information only.

candidates.summary: Straub is the incumbent District 3 commissioner; the approved dossier contains no detailed current campaign platform.
highlights: Has a direct incumbent county-governance record [S1][S2].

experience.basis: Incumbency and direct county-governance responsibility establish a maximal proven-record profile.

candidates.summary: Lesky is an independent candidate without an identity-safe professional biography or detailed platform in the approved dossier.
highlights: Official election material verifies his candidacy [S1].
